meta.title: Tenants10 — Digital Building Management
meta.description: Tenants10 brings communication, maintenance requests, document sharing, and common area bookings into one digital workspace. Built for the Swiss rental market.

hero.subtitle: Tenants10 brings communication, maintenance requests, document sharing, and common area bookings into one digital workspace. Built for the Swiss rental market.

stats.label: Built for the Swiss rental market

whoWeHelp.label: Who We Help
whoWeHelp.subtitle: Whether you rent, own, or manage — Tenants10 removes the friction from daily building operations.

tenants.title: Your building, finally organised
tenants.subtitle: No more WhatsApp groups, printed notices, or guessing when the laundry room is free. Everything you need as a tenant is in one place.

features.title: Direct communication
features.description: with management — no lost emails or unanswered calls.

features.title: Maintenance requests
features.description: submitted and tracked in real time, with full status visibility.

features.title: Book laundry rooms
features.description: parking spots, and shared spaces — instantly, conflict-free.

features.title: All documents
features.description: contracts, house rules, protocols — always accessible, always up to date.

owners.title: Full visibility, zero micromanagement
owners.subtitle: Know what's happening in your property without being involved in every conversation. Stay informed without being overwhelmed.

features.title: Maintenance oversight
features.description: see every request and its status, without being the middleman.

features.title: Document access
features.description: all contracts, protocols, and reports in one organised place.

features.title: Tenant communication
features.description: transparent, logged, and professional — always traceable.

features.title: Space utilisation
features.description: track how shared amenities are being used across your property.

propertyManagers.title: Manage more buildings with less effort
propertyManagers.subtitle: One platform for all your properties. Stop switching between tools, WhatsApp groups, and spreadsheets.

features.title: Multi-building dashboard
features.description: all your properties, teams, and tasks in one place.

features.title: Automated workflows
features.description: maintenance routing, notifications, and follow-ups run themselves.

features.title: Tenant onboarding
features.description: digital contracts and document distribution in minutes.

features.title: Owner reporting
features.description: instant reports for owners, audits, and compliance reviews.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: No complex setup. No technical knowledge needed. We handle the onboarding so you can focus on what matters.

steps.title: Tell us about your building
steps.description: Share your building details — number of units, current challenges, and what you need most. We tailor Tenants10 to your specific situation.

steps.title: We set everything up
steps.description: Our team configures your workspace, uploads existing documents, and creates access for all parties — tenants, owners, and managers. Zero effort on your side.

steps.title: Your building goes digital
steps.description: Everyone gets access. Communication flows through one channel. Maintenance gets tracked. Bookings work in real time. Chaos is replaced by clarity.

keyFeatures.label: Key Features
keyFeatures.subtitle: Four pillars that cover every aspect of daily building management — from the first message to the last document.

features.title: Centralised Communication
features.description: Replace fragmented WhatsApp groups, email threads, and paper notices with one structured channel. Every message is logged, searchable, and attributed. Building-wide announcements or private threads — you choose who sees what.

features.title: Maintenance & Operations
features.description: Tenants submit requests instantly. Managers assign, prioritise, and track every ticket from report to resolution. No phone calls, no follow-up chasing, no lost requests. Full transparency for everyone involved.

features.title: Space & Resource Bookings
features.description: Laundry rooms, parking spots, shared spaces — booked in seconds, conflict-free. Real-time availability visible to all. No printed schedules, no double-bookings, no disputes.

features.title: Document Hub
features.description: Contracts, house rules, protocols, notices — organised, searchable, and always available. Share with specific parties, update instantly, and keep full version history.

promise.label: Our Promise
promise.title: SAVE TIME OR KICK US OUT.
promise.description: We don't believe in long contracts or complex onboarding. If Tenants10 doesn't save you time within the first 30 days, you walk away. No questions. No fees.

items.question: How long does it take to set up Tenants10 for my building?
items.answer: Most buildings are fully set up within 48 hours. Our team handles the entire configuration — you just answer a few questions and we take care of the rest.

items.question: Is Tenants10 available in all four Swiss languages?
items.answer: Yes. The platform is fully available in German, French, Italian, and English. Tenants can choose their preferred language independently.

items.question: Do tenants need to download an app?
items.answer: Yes, a native app for iOS and Android is available. Tenants can also have access everything via a web browser on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop.

items.question: What if my building already uses other tools?
items.answer: We migrate your existing documents and data as part of onboarding. No manual re-entry needed. We work alongside existing tools during the transition period.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: All data is stored on Swiss servers, encrypted at rest and in transit. We comply fully with Swiss data protection law (nDSG) and GDPR.

items.question: How much does Tenants10 cost?
items.answer: Pricing is based on building size and number of units. We offer a 30-day free trial with no credit card required. Book a demo to receive a personalised quote.

getStarted.label: Get Started
getStarted.subtitle: Tell us about your building. We'll show you exactly how Tenants10 fits your situation — no commitment, no pressure.

form.title: Send us your building details
form.subtitle: We'll get back to you within 24 hours with a personalised walkthrough.
form.name: Name
form.challengePlaceholder: What's the main pain point in your building management right now?
form.privacy: Your data stays in Switzerland. No spam, no sharing with third parties.
form.successMessage: We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Digital property management for Swiss buildings. One app for tenants, owners, and property managers.
